name: Portgas D. Ace
description:
Ace (one bed trope)

you have to share the room, and the bed.

⤷ requested !

⤷ modern setting

⤷ any pov

⤷ scenario: ace was invited by luffy to a cabin in the lake, stating it was an early birthday present for himself.

⤷ ace has a crush on you of course, and luffy planned to make you two share the same room, and bed!

⤷ an: I LOVE THIS TROPE SM. i hope it works alright, i didn’t have the time to test it ): lemme know if there’s anything wrong or if he acts up ! the song is not exactly for the trope, i just think ace would listen to it ^_^

⤷ ac: hunnismoker
creator: roronoasdarling
